string 2: I can't leave the one I'm supposed to keep safe.
It's no use... This door is stuck.

But a major conflict is going to break out if we can't get 
through it soon, right? Isn't there some way to open it?

We have to hurry or a major conflict is going to break out! 
Isn't there some way to open the door?

D-Don't scare me like that! At least give me some warning
next time, okay?

We should be getting close to the government building. We
have to stop the fight that's about to start on its roof!
I need to find another way.
Looks like we got away for now. Let's hurry on ahead.
What are you doing?! Get out of there!
Are you returning to the station?
Yes.
{end}Not right now.

I'm ashamed to admit it, but I'm afraid we can't do this on
our own.

I hate to have to ask civilians for help, but please!
You've got to get that switch back!

I heard about everything from Dr. Simmons. This place is
pretty much under control.
Go and help the other installation sites.
We'll be fine now. Head to the next installation site.

You need a tool for electromagnetic net generator repairs? 
For Shiroki? This is what you're looking for right here.

It pains me to have to rely on civilians, but that's the
situation we're in. I'm counting on you.

The Digimon readings are approaching the electromagnetic
net generator.
Everyone there is in danger! You have to hurry!
You can probably break through with a DigiAttack {r2}.

Yikes! A human...?! But why...? I mean, where am I? What's
going on here?

There's something scary over there, and I don't know how to
get home... What should I do...?
No time to go back. Head for the government building.
What are you doing? The target coordinates aren't that way.

Use your partner Digimon's abilities to remove any obstacles
in your way.

The public often calls them "ghosts" or "monsters", but we've
decided to define phase electron life forms as "Digimon."

The Digivice enables interaction with such beings. A critical
function is the {fc9DigiAttack} {r2}.

It allows you to command your allies to hit hostile Digimon
with a preemptive strike. Go on. Give it a try.
